questions.question: Explain the difference between HashMap and TreeMap with respect to ordering, null handling, and performance characteristics.
expectedPoints: HashMap: No ordering, allows one null key, O(1) performance
TreeMap: Sorted order, may not allow null keys, O(log n) performance

questions.question: Describe how you would sort a Map by its values instead of keys. Include code examples and explain the approach step by step.
expectedPoints: Create new LinkedHashMap to preserve order
